title: IMMZ.D5.DT.Malaria.CI ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D5.DT.Malaria.CI ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

tchhtaotvc-64.72.en: The client has hypersensitivity to any of the vaccine components

mvcbccjircacn-100.67.en: Malaria vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note
